services.title: What I build

featured_work.title: Selected work
featured_work.subtitle: Government infrastructure, a self-founded startup, and independent technical projects.

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: A documented, reproducible delivery process — not just vibes.

steps.label: 01 PRD
steps.title: Product requirements, in writing
steps.description: Every project starts with a Product Requirements Document. Not a Figma file, not a Slack thread — a structured document covering who this is for, what it does, and what success looks like.

steps.label: 02 CLAUDE.md
steps.title: Technical spec for the build
steps.description: The PRD becomes a technical specification: stack decisions, architecture, component design, and build sequence — written before a single line of code.

steps.label: 03 Build
steps.title: Fast, iterative, documented
steps.description: With clear specs upfront, the build moves quickly. The docs serve as a living record — every decision is traceable, every deviation is intentional.

process.note: This site itself was built this way. The PRD and technical spec that produced it are part of the repository.

about_teaser.title: About Fathul
about_teaser.body: I'm Andi Fathul Mukminin — a fullstack developer based in Indonesia. I've built production systems for OIKN (Indonesia's sovereign capital authority), co-founded TOGA POS (a SaaS point-of-sale platform), and create data content on TikTok under the InsightfulBytes brand.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.subtitle: Whether you have a defined spec or just an idea — let's figure out the right scope together.

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: Case studies across government, startup, and independent projects.

about.title: About
about.intro: Fullstack developer. Government systems, startup co-founder, data creator.
about.bio_1: I'm Andi Fathul Mukminin — a fullstack developer based in Indonesia with a track record across three distinct contexts: production systems for government clients, co-founding a SaaS startup, and independent technical projects driven by genuine curiosity.
about.bio_2: At OIKN (Indonesia's sovereign capital authority for Nusantara), I built internal data management systems and reporting infrastructure that real government teams depend on. At TOGA POS, I co-founded a point-of-sale platform for Indonesian SMEs and learned what it takes to get a product to real users and keep it running.
about.bio_3: Outside client work, I create data content on TikTok under InsightfulBytes — breaking down BPS statistics and economic indicators for a general audience. It's a different kind of technical communication, and I find it genuinely valuable.
about.bio_4: The throughline: I like systems that work. Clear scope, solid documentation, and code that someone else (or future-me) can understand and extend.
about.cta_body: If you have a project that needs clear thinking and solid execution — I'd like to hear about it.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your project.
contact.body: The fastest way to get a response is via email or WhatsApp. I'm based in Indonesia (WIB/UTC+7) and typically reply within one business day.
contact.note: For project inquiries, a few sentences about what you're building and your timeline is enough to start. No formal brief required.

footer.tagline: Fullstack systems for governments, startups, and everyone between.
